Risk_Description: Contact details could leak onto public screens as new screens are added in Sprints 1-2
Mitigation_Action: RSU email is the only contact channel and appears only after mutual accept; NFR-02 public-screen scan before every merge

Risk_Description: Free-text pickup area or listing photos could reveal private info (room numbers; faces; room backgrounds)
Mitigation_Action: Constrain pickup area to general campus zones; item-only photo rule in form instruction

Risk_Description: Verification process could drift into storing ID numbers or images creating real PDPA exposure
Mitigation_Action: Locked decision: in-person visual check only; boolean verified flag stored; nothing else

Risk_Description: Listing title and pickup area rendered via innerHTML - typed HTML/script executes on render (stored XSS pattern)
Mitigation_Action: Sprint 1 fix: render user text with textContent; re-test with an HTML-tag listing title

Risk_Description: Admin actions not separated - anyone in the demo browser could change status or remove listings
Mitigation_Action: Separate labelled Admin view (demo) screen; status changes only from seller/admin views with confirmation (FR-11)

Risk_Description: Meet-safely tagline plus verified badge may overpromise safety while verification is simulated in the demo
Mitigation_Action: Reword to safer-meetups framing; add safe-meetup tips on detail screen; label verification as simulated for demo

Risk_Description: Users do not understand what happens after a contact request (2/5 in Lab 08) and misread Reserved status
Mitigation_Action: Sprint 1 (from mvp-decision.md): what-happens-next explainer after request; clearer Reserved wording; re-test in Lab 13

Risk_Description: Icons stock images or snippets could be added without license records during Sprints 1-2 and Lab 12 landing page
Mitigation_Action: Register-first rule: no asset enters the prototype before it is recorded in ip-and-third-party-assets.md with source and license

Risk_Description: localStorage is per-browser and wipeable causing inconsistent demo data; duplicate listings possible
Mitigation_Action: JSON seed self-heal plus Reset demo data button (built); duplicate-listing warning in Sprint 1; demo runs from one prepared browser
